title: Builder / New Construction Questionnaire
description: Answer these questions to create the new-construction seller document checklist. Agents prepare and send forms in their e-sign system, then upload signed copies here.

questions.label: Will the builder use their own contract package?
Is the property subject to an owner's association?
questions.help_text: This includes HOAs, POAs, condo associations, and mandatory membership associations.

questions.label: Is the property located in a special taxing or assessment district?
questions.help_text: Examples include MUD, PID, improvement district, or similar notices.

questions.label: Is the property in a flood hazard area?
Will another party get a referral fee from you for this transaction?

document_rules.name: Builder Disclosure / Builder Contract Package
document_rules.reason: Builder sales commonly use a builder-specific disclosure or contract packet

document_rules.name: New Home Contract - Completed Construction
document_rules.reason: Completed new construction using TREC new home contract

document_rules.name: New Home Contract - Incomplete Construction
document_rules.reason: Incomplete or to-be-built new construction using TREC new home contract

document_rules.name: Plans, Specifications, and Finish-Out Schedule
document_rules.reason: Incomplete construction commonly requires plans and specifications

document_rules.name: Addendum for Property Subject to Mandatory Membership in Owners' Association
Notice to Purchaser of Real Property Located in a Special Taxing or Assessment District
document_rules.reason: Property in special taxing or assessment district
